Formula ▸

hit ratio = hash / (hash + non-hash)

at worst = 0.00 / (0.00 + 3689000.00) = 0.0%

worst snapshot 2026_04_21_16_52_11 · hash table size 138,401

A high hit ratio means most index lookups are served directly from the adaptive hash index; a low one means InnoDB is falling back to B-tree traversal — consider whether AHI's memory is being paid for.
